overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes walking along a rocky mountain path at night toward an illuminated gothic castle. The scene transitions from a narrow corridor to open vistas of the castle, then into a forested mountain trail with stone stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky corridor approaching gothic castle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow rocky path between cliff walls toward the illuminated castle ahead

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow path
tall dark rock wall forming the right boundary of the narrow path
massive illuminated gothic castle with multiple spires visible in the distance
narrow dirt and stone path winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky corridor flanked by dark cliff walls on both sides. The path leads toward a massive illuminated gothic castle visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside with gothic castle dominating the right side

events.description: exits narrow rocky corridor into open hillside area with expansive view of the castle

agents.ego_description: walking along the widening path with the castle towering prominently on the right side

entered.detail: tall castle tower with illuminated clock face visible on the right
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide hillside area where the gothic castle dominates the right side of the frame, revealing a prominent clock tower. Pine trees line the left side of the path as the character continues walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with distant lake views

events.description: path turns left away from castle into forested mountain terrain with views of distant landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along a forested mountain path with the castle no longer in view, overlooking distant forests and a lake

entered.detail: dense forest covering the distant mountains visible ahead
body of water visible in the valley below to the right

segments.scene_description: The path turns away from the castle into a forested mountain trail. The castle exits view as the character walks along a cliff edge overlooking a distant forest and mountain lake, with pine trees now flanking both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending through dense pine forest

events.description: path transitions to stone stairs and begins ascending the mountain slope

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through a dark pine forest toward a figure standing ahead on the path

notable_agents.action: hooded figure standing motionless at the top of the stone stairs ahead

entered.detail: weathered stone steps forming a staircase ascending the mountain slope

segments.scene_description: The dirt path gives way to ancient stone stairs ascending through a dense pine forest. The character climbs the stairs toward a mysterious hooded figure standing motionless ahead on the path, with rocky outcrops visible through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky pass into an expansive mountain vista and finally into a dense, mysterious forest. It begins with the character walking through a narrow corridor flanked by dark cliff walls, moving steadily toward a massive illuminated gothic castle in the distance. As the path opens into a wide hillside, the castle dominates the frame with its prominent clock tower while pine trees begin to line the route. The scene then shifts as the path turns away from the fortress, leading the character along a cliff edge overlooking a distant forest and mountain lake before the castle disappears from view. Finally, the dirt trail gives way to ancient stone stairs ascending through a thick pine forest toward a motionless hooded figure standing among the rocky outcrops.
